entries.menu_path_en: Top navbar → question mark icon (?) → How-to or Report/request.
entries.menu_path_id: Navbar atas → ikon tanda tanya (?) → How-to atau Report/request.
entries.notes: Knowledge is rebuilt with: php artisan help:reindex

entries.menu_path_en: Top navbar → robot icon → Domain Assistant page (live ERP data; not the HELP book icon).
entries.menu_path_id: Navbar atas → ikon robot → halaman Domain Assistant (data ERP langsung; bukan ikon HELP).
entries.notes: Separate from HELP (?). Manuals: domain-assistant-manual-en.md / domain-assistant-manual-id.md. HELP reindex does not affect Domain Assistant tools.

entries.menu_path_en: Main sidebar → Reports (expand for report lists and Open Items, etc.).
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping utama → Laporan (buka submenu untuk daftar laporan, Open Items, dll.).

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Approval Dashboard (under MAIN).
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Approval Dashboard (di grup MAIN).

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Sales → Dashboard.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Sales → Dashboard.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Purchase → Dashboard.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Purchase → Dashboard.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Sales → Sales Orders.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Sales → Sales Orders.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Sales → Delivery Orders.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Sales → Delivery Orders.
entries.notes: Cancel vs Reverse: see delivery-order-manual-id.md. Reverse requires permission delivery-orders.reverse. Reindex: php artisan help:reindex after manual edits.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Sales → Sales Invoices. Create from DO after delivered/completed.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Sales → Sales Invoices. Buat dari DO setelah delivered/completed.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Sales → Sales Receipts (customer payments against invoices). Draft receipts: View → Edit; posted receipts cannot be edited.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Sales → Sales Receipts (pelunasan faktur). Draft: buka detail → Edit; yang sudah posted tidak bisa diedit.
entries.notes: Manuals: sales-receipt-manual-en.md, sales-receipt-manual-id.md. Reindex: php artisan help:reindex

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Sales → Sales Credit Memos. One memo per posted Sales Invoice (duplicate blocked).
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Sales → Sales Credit Memos. Satu memo per Sales Invoice yang sudah posting (duplikasi ditolak).
entries.notes: Manuals: sales-invoice-manual-id.md (section Sales Credit Memo), sales-workflow-corrections-help-*.md. Reindex: php artisan help:reindex

entries.menu_path_en: Document detail (SO, DO, SI, …) → header button Relationship Map → modal Document Relationship Map; diagram section Document Workflow.
entries.menu_path_id: Halaman detail dokumen (SO, DO, SI, …) → tombol Relationship Map di header → modal; bagian diagram bernama Document Workflow.
entries.notes: Node labels show document type, number, date, status, amount. sales-workflow-corrections-help-*.md

entries.title_en: Wrong company entity on sales documents
entries.menu_path_en: Sales Order form: Company entity field. If SI posted: Sales Credit Memos + unlink DO–SI + Reverse delivery as needed; see checklist-perbaikan-salah-entitas-so-id.md.
entries.menu_path_id: Form Sales Order: field Company entity. Jika SI sudah posting: Sales Credit Memos + lepas tautan DO–SI + Reverse delivery bila perlu; lihat checklist-perbaikan-salah-entitas-so-id.md.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Purchase → Purchase Invoices.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Purchase → Purchase Invoices.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Purchase → Purchase Orders.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Purchase → Purchase Orders.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Purchase → Goods Receipt PO.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Purchase → Goods Receipt PO.

entries.menu_path_en: Inventory → item detail: Recent Transactions (Unit Cost vs document price); item edit: valuation method.
entries.menu_path_id: Inventory → detail item: Recent Transactions (Unit Cost vs harga dokumen); edit item: metode valuasi.

entries.menu_path_en: Inventory module — ITO/ITI and warehouse transfer flows (see warehouse stock transfer manual).
entries.menu_path_id: Modul Inventory — alur ITO/ITI dan transfer antar gudang (lihat manual transfer stok).

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Inventory → GR/GI Management.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Inventory → GR/GI Management.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Master Data, Inventory (items), Business Partner, etc.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Master Data, Inventory (item), Business Partner, dll.

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Accounting (Chart of Accounts, Journals, Periods, Account Statements, Cash Expenses, Currencies, etc.).
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Accounting (COA, Jurnal, Periode, Account Statement, Kas/Bank, Mata Uang, dll.).

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Accounting → Account Statements → Generate or list. Not the Business Partner → Account statement tab.
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Accounting → Account Statements → Generate atau daftar. Bukan tab Account statement di Business Partner.
entries.notes: Manuals: account-statements-module-manual-en.md / account-statements-module-manual-id.md. Reindex: php artisan help:reindex

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Taxation (if installed for your role).
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Taxation / Pajak (sesuai izin).

entries.menu_path_en: Sidebar → Fixed Assets (categories, assets, depreciation, disposal, etc.).
entries.menu_path_id: Menu samping → Fixed Assets (kategori, aset, penyusutan, pelepasan, dll.).
